name: Applied Systems Insurance Agency Management API
what_it_does: Applied Systems REST API for insurance agency management system (AMS) platform. Enables AI agents to manage client account and policy data retrieval for agency operations, handle commercial lines policy and certificate management, access renewal workflow and expiration tracking for account management, retrieve commission and revenue management data for agency accounting, manage prospect and new business pipeline for sales automation, handle document management and e-signature integration for policy delivery, access ACORD form generation and carrier integration workflows, retrieve claims reporting and loss run data for risk management, manage employee and producer performance analytics, and integrate agency management data with CRM, accounting, and insurer portals.
use_cases: Retrieving policy data for client communications from agency automation agents
Managing renewal tracking from account management agents
Generating certificates of insurance from compliance agents
Integrating agency data with CRM from sales operations agents
not_for: Insurance carriers without agency and broker distribution channel focus
Personal lines only without commercial lines and complex account management
Small single-agent operations without agency management system requirements
best_when: An insurance agency or MGA using Applied Systems Epic or TAM wants AI agents to automate client communication, renewal management, certificate generation, commission tracking, and insurer portal integration.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Agency management data contains client PII and policy information subject to state insurance data privacy laws — automated data access requires proper E&O and agency license compliance. Certificate of insurance automation must accurately reflect policy terms; incorrect COIs create professional liability. Commission data automation must comply with carrier compensation disclosure requirements.

auth.notes: Applied Systems uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-agency API credentials. Developer portal at developer.appliedsystems.com. Webhooks for account and policy events. REST API with JSON responses. Applied Epic and Applied TAM are primary AMS products. Applied CSR24 for self-service portal. Applied Pay for agency payment processing. Largest insurance agency technology provider in North America.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual agency subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user and per-module subscription; API access included with agency subscription
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 1983. Private (Hellman & Friedman portfolio). Insurance agency management market leader. 37,000+ agencies. Applied Epic and Applied TAM are dominant AMS platforms. Applied Network for carrier connectivity. Largest insuretech/AMS company by market share in North America. Competes with Vertafore for insurance agency technology.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Agency data access requires proper E&O coverage and insurance license; automated data export must comply with state insurance privacy laws
Epic vs. TAM data models — Applied Epic and TAM have different data models; verify which AMS your agency uses before integrating; APIs differ significantly
ACORD form complexity — ACORD form generation requires understanding of insurance form standards; automated form population must validate against ACORD specification
COI accuracy — automated certificate generation must reflect actual policy coverages and endorsements; review COI accuracy against underlying policy data
Carrier connectivity — Applied Network provides carrier integration; direct API access for carrier transactions may require separate carrier API credentials
On-premises vs. cloud — many agencies run Applied Epic on-premises; verify cloud vs. on-premises deployment before API planning
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance AMS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA. Client policy and insurance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance agency management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA. Client and policy data.
